${kill_not_permitted}Strike a deal with a non-red to cause at least 3 hearts of damage to another non-red. You succeed when they have dealt the damage.
Create a damaging trap in someone's base. You succeed when it's unintentionally triggered. If it's discovered, you must make a new one. You can make multiple until one is triggered successfully.
Go invisible and hit at least 5 different people with a sword within 1 minute without being hit back.
Find a non red name with at least 20 hearts. Take approximately 10 of them in any way you see fit. If there are none, damage any player for at least 5 hearts.
Cause any amount of damage to a non-red using an anvil.
Use redstone to damage a non-red player. You can not hit them with the item, it must be a machine or trap of some kind.
Punch another player into lava. It can be lava you have placed.
Build a TNT cannon and successfully hit a base from at least 50 blocks
Mine a big hole underground then spleef a player into it.
Fire arrows from an unenchanted bow continuously at a player until they deflect with a shield. If they die, you also succeed.
Cause a player to take suffocation damage of any kind.
${kill_not_permitted}Get another player to look at an enderman.
Do any amount of damage to another player with dripstone (Must be placed by you).
Add berry bushes anywhere and everywhere. Cause someone to get pricked by one. You can punch people into the bushes if you need to.
Cause a player to take fall damage of over 1 heart.
Build a base at close to build height to "hide your valuables". Wait for another player to investigate and push them off.
Dig many 1x1 holes at least 15 blocks deep in high traffic areas until someone falls in one. Hide them with tall grass.
Build an explosive under a high traffic area. Detonate it from afar when a conversation is happening. If you deal any damage, you succeed.
You must damage a non-red by firing a bow straight up into the air. The angle can not be below roughly 70 degrees.
Tame at least 5 wolves and use them to deal damage to a non-red.
Enderpearl into a conversation, deal as much damage and you can to as many players, if you are hit or they all run away, enderpearl away.
Kill a ${green/yellow} name by any means. They can fight back once you have initiated combat.
Go invisible and punch a ${green/yellow} name off a cliff. They must take at least 3 hearts of damage.
Kill a ${green/yellow} name with a trap of any kind.
Summon a mob using an egg to deal any damage to any ${green/yellow}.
Hit a ${green/yellow} name with a sword until they block you with a shield. If you kill them, you also succeed.
